name: radia-mcp
summary: MCP servers for the Radia CAE ecosystem -- Cubit / build123d / gmsh / NGSolve / PEEC / IH + 30+ specialized knowledge subpackages (panel-review, CLN MOR, COMSOL multilingual RAG, electromagnet, magnetic-materials, motor, accelerator, NMR/MRI, NDT, metamaterial, WPT, TEAM benchmark, etc.).  See README.md + CHANGELOG.md for per-release notes.
author: Kengo Sugahara
